description:
𝙲𝙾𝙼𝙼𝙸𝚂𝚂𝙸𝙾𝙽 𝙵𝙾𝚁 𝚂𝚑𝟶𝚝𝚐𝚞𝚗𝚡𝙿𝟹𝚗𝚐𝚞𝚒𝚗 | 𝙰𝙽𝚈!𝙿𝙾𝚅 𝙽𝙴𝚁𝙳 𝚄𝚂𝙴𝚁 𝚡 𝙵𝙾𝙾𝚃𝙱𝙰𝙻𝙻 𝙿𝙻𝙰𝚈𝙴𝚁 𝙾𝚁𝙲 | 𝚆𝙷𝙾 𝙳𝙸𝙳 𝚃𝙷𝙸𝚂 𝚃𝙾 𝚈𝙾𝚄? | 𝚃𝙷𝙸𝚂 𝙼𝙰𝙽 𝙸𝚂 𝙰𝙱𝙾𝚄𝚃 𝚃𝙾 𝙶𝙴𝚃 𝚅𝙸𝙾𝙻𝙴𝙽𝚃 𝚆𝙸𝚃𝙷 𝚆𝙷𝙾𝙴𝚅𝙴𝚁 𝚃𝙾𝚄𝙲𝙷𝙴𝙳 𝚈𝙾𝚄. 𝙿𝚄𝙽𝙲𝙷𝚈 𝙿𝚄𝙽𝙲𝙷 𝙿𝚄𝙽𝙲𝙷

𝚃𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝚝𝚒𝚖𝚎 𝚜𝚘𝚖𝚎𝚋𝚘𝚍𝚢'𝚜 𝚐𝚎𝚝𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚑𝚞𝚛𝚝 / 𝙷𝚎𝚛𝚎 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚎𝚜 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚗𝚎𝚡𝚝 𝚌𝚘𝚗𝚝𝚎𝚜𝚝𝚊𝚗𝚝 / 𝙸𝚜 𝚝𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚘𝚗 𝚖𝚢 𝚐𝚒𝚛𝚕𝚏𝚛𝚒𝚎𝚗𝚍? / 𝙸𝚜 𝚝𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚑𝚊𝚗𝚍? / 𝙸 𝚠𝚒𝚜𝚑 𝚢𝚘𝚞'𝚍 𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 𝚊𝚐𝚊𝚒𝚗 / 𝙸'𝚕𝚕 𝚠𝚊𝚝𝚌𝚑 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚕𝚎𝚊𝚟𝚎 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎 𝚕𝚒𝚖𝚙𝚒𝚗𝚐 / 𝙸 𝚠𝚒𝚜𝚑 𝚢𝚘𝚞'𝚍 𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 𝚊𝚐𝚊𝚒𝚗

Robrak was away for a game. They won, but the worry and anger coursing through him has his hand shaking as he dials your number for the fifth time. No answer. The screen shatters, and he will get answers as to why you're not answering.

TW: Possible violence (not toward you!).

ROBRAK IS BACCCKKKK! Only more... In his feelings for you. OHHH. The shockerrrrrrr. He fell and he fell hard. HOW DARE YOUUU.

Scenario help and the usual "WHAT THE HELL DO I DO?" type situation: The scenario is completely up to you. But it's implied someone put their hands on you. That is up to you. You could be dramatic and clumsy, say you fell.

WHY IS THE FIRST MESSAGE SO MUCH LONGER THAN THE PERSONALITY?!?!: Listen Linda- If the first message is longer than the personality? That's good! The personality and scenario are the main things you wanna keep under 1000 tokens. First message usually just goes toward how the character will act.

HE DID THIS, HE DID THAT!: Okay. That's not on me, sugar pop. That is the llm. I tested him. He didn't SA me, he didn't beat the hell outta me. He never laid a hand on me. So. If he does that, that is the llm. Copy your message, delete what you had. Redo it. Or go to my profile and go to Kolach's page and use her prompt for the LLM. IT WORKS. 🫶🏻
